changes: Added 8 new events: VLCC Al Salmi struck by Iranian drone at Dubai port Mar 31 (2M bbl crude, fire, oil spill risk, WTI $106.70); Iran Parliament approved Hormuz toll plan Mar 31; Trump threatened to obliterate Kharg Island+desalination Mar 30; Iran confirmed Tangsiri death Mar 30; 82nd Airborne deploying; Jeddah Summit Mar 31 (MBS, Qatar Emir, Jordan King); Salalah Port resuming operations Mar 31 (Maersk); Prince Sultan Air Base struck Mar 28. Added 1 new shutdown entry (sd-023 Al Salmi VLCC). Updated Iran events (Parliament toll, Trump threat, Tangsiri death confirmed). Updated Oman Salalah Port to partial (resuming). Updated isNew flags. Oil prices: Brent +55% in March (record), WTI crossed $100. 195 Hormuz crossings in March (95% drop). LME aluminium $3,492/t (+6%). S&P Platts bifurcating FOB Arab Gulf pricing from Apr 1. No new FM declarations.
newEvents: VLCC Al Salmi struck by Iranian drone at Dubai port anchorage — 2M bbl crude, fire, hull damage, oil spill risk; WTI spiked to $106.70 (Mar 31)
Iran Parliament Security Committee approved Hormuz toll plan, legalizing rial-based toll system (Mar 31)
Trump threatened to 'completely obliterate' Kharg Island, oil wells, desalination plants (Mar 30)
Iran confirmed IRGC Navy commander Tangsiri death from Mar 26 Israeli strike; also killed: intelligence head Rezaei (Mar 30)
82nd Airborne Division (~1,000 soldiers) expected to deploy imminently; 31st MEU already in region (Mar 30)
Jeddah Summit: MBS, Qatar Emir, Jordan King condemn Iranian attacks on civilian infrastructure (Mar 31)
Maersk announced gradual resumption of Salalah Port operations Mar 31 after drone strike repair (Mar 31)
Iran struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia — 15+ US troops wounded, aircraft destroyed (Mar 28)
Express Rome container ship reported two projectiles near Ras Tanura — no damage (Mar 30)
Pakistan FM visiting China Mar 31 to coordinate peace efforts after 4-nation Islamabad summit
S&P Platts launching new FOB Arab Gulf 'Inside Strait' spot differential assessments from Apr 1
Brent +55% in March — record monthly surge since contract inception in 1988
195 Hormuz commodity crossings in March (95% drop from 2,652 same period 2025); 174.2M bbl floating storage
noNewFmReason: No new FM declarations found in last 48 hours. All 24 existing FMs remain active. Crisis has escalated beyond commercial FM phase into direct military targeting of civilian infrastructure (VLCC at port, aluminium smelters) and preparations for ground operations (82nd Airborne). Iran Parliament formalizing Hormuz toll system suggests long-term Strait control intent.

keyRisks: VLCC AT PORT: Iran drone struck fully laden VLCC Al Salmi at Dubai port — first attack on laden tanker at commercial port; WTI $106.70
HORMUZ TOLL LEGALIZED: Iran Parliament approved Hormuz toll plan, signaling long-term Strait control intent, not temporary wartime measure
TRUMP ESCALATION: Threatened to obliterate Kharg Island + desalination; 82nd Airborne deploying; April 6 deadline approaching
DUAL CHOKEPOINT: Houthi Bab al-Mandeb closure threat + Hormuz = near-total ME export blockade. Goldman warns $135 Brent
GROUND OPS: 31st MEU + 82nd Airborne positioning for Kharg Island seizure and coastal raids — Trump Apr 6 deadline
DIPLOMATIC DEADLOCK: Iran suspended nuclear talks, dismissed Pakistan-mediated 4-nation overtures. Trump says 'pretty sure' of deal but signals willingness to end war without reopening Hormuz
